name: Instruction Following
description: Evaluates strict adherence to explicit instructions, format compliance, constraints, and factuality.

perspectives.name: Explicit Instructions
perspectives.description: Did the model follow all explicitly stated instructions?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing instruction following. Evaluate whether the AI response precisely follows every explicit instruction given in the system prompt and user message.

perspectives.name: Format Compliance
perspectives.description: Does the response match the requested output format?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing format compliance. Evaluate whether the AI response is formatted exactly as requested (e.g., JSON, markdown, numbered lists, specific structure).

perspectives.name: Constraint Adherence
perspectives.description: Does the model respect all constraints (length, topics, style)?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing constraint adherence. Evaluate whether the AI response respects all stated constraints such as word limits, topic restrictions, or stylistic requirements.

perspectives.name: No Hallucination
perspectives.description: Does the model avoid fabricating information?
perspectives.systemPrompt: You are an expert evaluator assessing factual accuracy and hallucination avoidance. Evaluate whether the AI avoids making up facts, citing non-existent sources, or fabricating information.
